boundary_notes: Edge cases vs other skills: embedding saved dashboards by id → core; editing/building charts for end-users → analytics-studio; multi-tenant isolation → multitenancy; auth/token setup → core; dark theme container background → also handled in theming; chart broken/blank → troubleshooting FIRST.

evals.prompt: I have three Luzmo Flex charts on the same page and they all seem to be sharing filter state — when I change a filter on one chart, it affects the others. I'm pretty sure each chart should be independent.
evals.expected_output: Identify the contextId gotcha: all chart instances on the page must have a unique contextId. Sharing a contextId causes charts to share state (filters, interactions).
expectations: Identifies `contextId` as the cause of shared state
States that `contextId` must be unique across all chart instances on the page
Explains that reusing a contextId causes filter and interaction state to be shared

evals.prompt: I'm getting 'Invalid title' error when I set my Flex bar chart options to { title: 'Quarterly Revenue' }. What's wrong with this?
evals.expected_output: Identifies that title must be a localized object { en: 'Quarterly Revenue' } not a plain string, and explains this applies to all user-facing text properties.
expectations: Identifies the plain string as the error cause
Shows the correct localized shape: `{ en: 'Quarterly Revenue' }`
States this applies to title, label, description, and other user-facing text
May warn against nested title pattern: `{ title: { en: '...' } }`

evals.prompt: My Flex bar chart component renders in the DOM but is completely invisible — DevTools shows 0px height. I'm using React with @luzmo/react-embed. What am I missing?
evals.expected_output: Identify the Flex sizing requirement: both the container div AND the chart component need explicit height and width. Without dimensions, Flex charts collapse to 0 height.
expectations: Identifies missing explicit dimensions as the cause
States that BOTH the container and the component need height/width set
Mentions this is the most common Flex rendering failure
Does not route to dashboard embedding docs — this is a Flex chart issue

evals.prompt: I need to embed a Luzmo dashboard in a React app. I have my API key and token but I'm not sure which npm package to install or how to pass the credentials safely. Can you walk me through the setup?
evals.expected_output: This is a saved dashboard embedding question — route to `core` for dashboard component setup and secure token handling.
expectations: Routes to `core` for embedding a saved dashboard by id
Does not attempt to fully answer dashboard embedding without referencing core
May briefly mention server-side token generation as context

evals.prompt: My local React app renders a Luzmo Flex chart but the browser console floods with reconnecting /realtime socket errors and the chart eventually shows Query failed. apiHost points directly at https://api.luzmo.com.
evals.expected_output: Identify the local-development CORS/realtime issue. The answer should direct the user to proxy `/0.1.0` and `/realtime` through the local app origin, set Flex `apiHost` to the local app origin, and keep `appServer` pointed directly at the Luzmo app host. It should not suggest proxying appServer under a sub-path.
expectations: Identifies the reconnecting `/realtime` socket as a local-development CORS/realtime issue
Recommends proxying `/0.1.0` and `/realtime` through the local app origin
Says to set Flex `apiHost` to the local app origin
Says to keep `appServer` pointed directly at the Luzmo app host
Does NOT recommend proxying or rewriting `appServer` under a sub-path
